Main Module¶

Main Module¶

The entry point for the Contacts REST API. This module initializes the FastAPI application, configures middlewares, sets up rate limiting, and includes all API routers.

async main.healthchecker(request: Request)[source]¶

Health check endpoint to verify the API status. Limited to 5 requests per minute.

Parameters:

request – The incoming HTTP request.

Returns:

Status OK message.

main.lifespan(app: FastAPI)[source]¶

Manages the application lifespan. Initializes the database tables on startup.

main.read_root()[source]¶

Root endpoint that returns a welcome message.

Returns:

Dictionary with a welcome message.
